w:r.w:t: Full Website Copy – AI Revenue Workforce (V1)
Primary conversion goal: Start Free Forever. Secondary: Direct upgrade from Pricing.
Home | How It Works | Industries | Pricing | Why
Primary CTA Button: Start Free Forever
Headline: Deploy Your AI Revenue Workforce.
: Lead generation, nurturing, appointment booking, and closing.
Text-first with voice escalation when it matters.
Follow-up that does not stop • Human escalation option • Built on real-world sales systems
deploys specialized agents that perform the critical revenue work most businesses fail to execute consistently.
• Lead Generation Agent: engages every opportunity instantly
• Appointment Setter Agent: qualifies and books directly into your calendar
• Closing Agent: nurtures, persuades, follows up, and converts
Title: Most Leads Never Convert Because Nobody Follows Up Properly.
Body: Leads go cold fast. Humans get busy. CRMs do not sell. “Automation” usually means a few emails and silence.
is built to keep going until the prospect converts or opts out.
1) Capture: widget, inbound messages, or imported lead lists
2) Engage: instant text-first conversation to qualify and build intent
3) Nurture: persistent follow-up over days and weeks, not minutes
4) Close: booking, proposals, payment links, and escalation when needed
Title: Text First Removes Escape Routes.
catches prospects fast and keeps them
engaged where they already live. When escalation improves conversion probability,
can switch to voice support without losing the thread.
• Local Service Businesses: turn inquiries into booked jobs
• Consultants and Coaches: turn interest into paid sessions
• Marketing Companies: convert inbound leads into clients
• Ecommerce: recover buyers and convert hesitant visitors
Body: Activate Launch Tier and see how an AI Revenue Workforce behaves with real prospects.
Movement line: Join the Workforce Revolution.
: A clear, engineered system designed to capture, nurture, book, and close without human bottlenecks.
is built around one idea: revenue requires consistent behavior at speed, at scale.
Your workforce executes that behavior 24/7 across the full prospect lifecycle.
Purpose: capture and initiate conversations immediately.
• responds to website inquiries in seconds
• routes the prospect into next steps
Purpose: convert interest into calendar commitments.
• asks the right questions to qualify
• offers time slots and books appointments
Purpose: convert qualified prospects into paid customers.
• escalates to human closer when appropriate (plan-dependent)
Most money is made in follow-up.
is designed to keep engaging the prospect through timing windows humans typically miss.
• used when escalation improves conversion probability
• keeps the same context and transcript
Key promise: no lost context. One unified transcript.
connects to your tools through secure API connections.
• CRM updates, lead records, pipeline stages
Ready to see it in action?
Headline: Built for Businesses That Need Consistent Conversion
: If leads come in and money leaks out, an AI Revenue Workforce fixes the system.
Examples: contractors, med spas, dentists, home services, clinics
• responds instantly to inquiries and missed calls (text-first)
• qualifies by service type, urgency, location, budget
• follows up until the prospect commits or opts out
Result: more booked jobs, fewer missed opportunities
• turns “I’m interested” into booked strategy calls
• nurtures leads who are not ready today
• sends proposals and payment links when appropriate
Result: more booked calls and higher close rates
• nurtures long-cycle prospects so your pipeline stays alive
Result: fewer lead leaks, more qualified calls
• answers product questions instantly (shipping, sizing, compatibility, stock)
• recovers abandoned buyers through follow-up (email/SMS when enabled)
high-intent prospects to voice support if needed
Result: higher conversion rate, lower abandoned intent
Deploy your AI Revenue Workforce today.
Headline: Pricing for Your AI Revenue Workforce
. Start free, then scale capability as your volume grows.
• Start with Launch to experience the workflow.
• Upgrade when you need more voice minutes, outreach capacity, lead uploads, or closing power.
• Every tier is designed as a capability unlock, not a feature checklist.
Best for: getting started and proving the system with real prospects.
Best for: deploying your first serious revenue operator.
Best for: expanding your workforce and enabling automated closing.
• AI Closer or Human Closer option
Best for: a full revenue infrastructure with custom scripting and routing.
• AI Closer or Human Closer option
Best for: maximum scale, human takeover, and API access.
• AI Closer or Human Closer option
• All outreach emails must pass verification
We do not promise exact numbers because that is not honest.
We guarantee the system and the effort:
is trained on real-world revenue operations and built to execute the behaviors that produce outcomes.

Your results depend on your market, offer, lead quality, and sales environment. Our promise is that you receive the strongest chance at achieving your revenue goals through consistent, engineered execution.
Deploy your AI Revenue Workforce now.
: Most businesses buy software. Few build revenue infrastructure.
answer. Automation sends a few messages.
requires persistent, well-timed behavior across the entire customer lifecycle.
The next advantage is not more tools.
It is deploying a workforce that operates continuously, with consistent standards.
SECTION: THE SEVEN CORE ELEMENTS OF ONLINE AI SALES (
Most revenue is in the follow-up.
Protects your time and routes prospects correctly.
Text-first plus email/SMS and voice escalation when needed.
Human help at the right moment, not as a default.
Proposals, payment links, and closing workflows integrated into the flow.
No fatigue, no delays, no dropped opportunities.
SECTION: WHY TEXT-FIRST IS THE FOUNDATION
Text reduces friction, keeps context, and maintains consistency.
Voice is used as a strategic closer, not the default.
SECTION: WHAT THIS MEANS FOR YOU
is an AI Revenue Workforce that performs lead generation, appointment setting, nurturing, and closing behavior automatically.
executes revenue workflows and persistent follow-up designed to convert.
The goal is to engage while intent is highest.
Yes. Nurturing is a core capability. Follow-up continues until the prospect converts, opts out, or is disqualified.
Text-first architecture with voice escalation, persistent nurture logic, and workforce roles trained on real-world sales systems.
Yes. It can qualify and book into your calendar based on your rules.
Yes, on plans that include proposal sending.
Yes, via Stripe workflows when enabled.
9) Can I upload my own leads?
Yes, on tiers that include lead upload.
email verification. Verification is also available as an add-on.
Yes. Human escalation and takeover options are available by plan.
12) What happens after a human takes over?
The conversation remains unified. Context is preserved so nothing is lost.
No. The system is text-first. Voice is used as support and escalation to increase close rates.
Not required to start, but recommended for best reporting and lifecycle management.
Local service businesses, consultants/coaches, marketing companies, and ecommerce.
adapts to your sales workflow and offer.
16) What if my business is considered high risk?
Fraud industries are excluded. Abuse monitoring is enforced to protect deliverability and platform integrity.
Call recording is available as an add-on where permitted by law. You are responsible for required disclosures and consent.

Recommended: cancel anytime, access until end of billing period.)

Recommended: no refunds on used time, but allow cancellation anytime.)
Each plan includes capacity limits for voice minutes, outreach emails, SMS, and lead uploads. Upgrade when you need more volume.
Data is handled using standard security practices. (Owner note: align this section with your actual technical stack and policies.)
lead generation agent connects with our netw
23) What is the fastest way to succeed?
Let the workforce engage real prospects. Upgrade when you consistently hit limits and want more closing power.
Start Free Forever and experience it yourself.
: Access your AI Revenue Workforce dashboard.
: If you have a serious operational question, contact us here.
• Support: for account, billing, and technical issues
If your request is urgent, include “URGENT” in the subject line.
Important: These are baseline drafts for fast launch. They are not legal advice. Replace placeholders and review with counsel when possible.
• Usage data (messages, call minutes, logs, feature usage)
• Communication data (conversations and transcripts if enabled)
• Billing data (processed by Stripe; we do not store full card numbers)
• Security, abuse monitoring, and fraud prevention
We share information only with service providers necessary to operate the platform (e.g., payment processing, messaging, infrastructure) and as required by law.
We retain data as needed to provide the service and comply with legal obligations. You may request deletion subject to retention requirements.
If you record calls or message prospects, you are responsible for lawful notice and consent in your jurisdiction.
We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards. No method of transmission is 100% secure.
provides an AI Revenue Workforce system including messaging, automation, and related features as described on the website.
Paid plans are billed monthly unless otherwise stated. You authorize recurring charges until cancellation.
We do not guarantee specific revenue outcomes. Results vary based on market, offer, lead quality, and implementation.
for fraud, deception, illegal activity, or abuse. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms.
You are responsible for compliance with email, SMS, and calling laws (consent, opt-out,
We aim for high uptime but do not promise uninterrupted service.
To the maximum extent permitted by law,
is not liable for indirect damages and is limited to amounts paid in the prior [30] days.
We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations or abuse.
, scraping without permission, or abusive outreach
• attempting to bypass limits or security controls
• using the platform for restricted or unlawful industries
We enforce abuse monitoring to protect deliverability and platform integrity.
You may cancel at any time. Access remains active until the end of the billing period unless otherwise stated.
(Owner note: choose one policy and publish it clearly.
Recommended for SaaS: no refunds on used time, but allow cancellation anytime.)
This phase establishes the operational backbone of the
Premium full website and brand infrastructure
Client portal foundation and workforce control center
Lead capture via intelligent text-first widget
Workforce pipeline visibility and status dashboard
Stripe billing integration and subscription control
Clients gain immediate operational workforce capability with full visibility and control.
This phase expands communication channels and improves engagement depth.
Enhanced inbound calling with intelligent routing
Outbound AI calling with persistent follow-up logic
Voice escalation directly from text conversations
The workforce expands beyond text into fully integrated voice communication.
This phase improves conversion performance and workforce decision-making.
Smart escalation triggers based on engagement behavior
The workforce becomes progressively more effective at converting opportunities into revenue.
deeply into client systems and workflows.
becomes fully embedded into client infrastructure.
This phase introduces native revenue capture infrastructure.
Automated lead capture from landing pages
Seamless connection between page visitor and workforce engagement
Clients can deploy revenue capture pages directly inside
This eliminates dependency on external page builders.
This phase enhances transparency and performance intelligence.
Clients gain clear insight into workforce performance and revenue impact.
This phase allows workforce customization and specialization.
The workforce adapts precisely to each client’s business model.
This phase strengthens scale, stability, and enterprise readiness.
maintains enterprise-grade reliability as it scales.
continuously becomes more capable over time.
How this should appear visually on the website
Foundation → Communication → Intelligence → Integrations → Landing Page Builder → Visibility → Specialization → Infrastructure → Enterprise → Continuous Advancement
